description_long: This office building features a modern, boxy structure with extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows framed in dark metal, creating a grid-like facade on multiple sides. The building is predominantly white with large transparent sections, allowing visibility into the interior, which appears to have open-plan office spaces and some visible furnishings. The roof is flat and partially open, with some mechanical or utility structures visible on top. The window arrangement is highly regular, with large rectangular panes forming a consistent pattern across the exterior. One side of the building is more solid, with fewer windows, likely housing service areas or stairwells. The overall design is sleek and minimalist, characteristic of contemporary urban office architecture.
description: A modern office building with extensive floor-to-ceiling glass windows in a grid pattern, white exterior walls, and a flat roof with visible rooftop structures.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main facade with two stories of large, grid-patterned glass windows and a glimpse of the open-plan interior.
description_view_1: This side shows a mostly solid white wall with a single vertical strip of windows, contrasting with the glass-heavy facades.
description_view_2: This angle reveals another solid wall with a vertical window section and a partial view of the rooftop utility area.
description_view_3: This perspective displays another glass-dominated facade, with interior furnishings visible through the transparent windows.
attribute_window_pattern: Highly regular, floor-to-ceiling rectangular windows in a grid pattern, evenly spaced across the facade.
